verses.text: Tua ciangin Israel mi khempeuh David kiang Hebron-ah hong kikhawm uh a, “En in, kote nangma guh leh nangma sa ka hi uh hi

A hun beisa, Saul kumpi ahih sung nangawnin Israel a kuankhiatpih leh a ciahpihpa nangmah na hi hi. Topa na Pasian in nangma kiangah, ‘Nang pen ka mi Israel-te a cingpa na hi ding a, ka mi Israel-te tungah ulian na hi ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Israel upate khempeuh kumpipa kiang Hebron-ah hong pai uh hi. Tua ciangin David in Topa' mai Hebron-ah amaute tawh thuciamna khat bawl a, Samuel' tung tawnin Topa' thugen bangin amaute in Israel kumpi-in David sathau a nilh uh hi.
Tua ciangin Jebus mite a ten'na, Jebus a kici Jerusalem-ah David leh Israel mi khempeuh hong pai uh hi
Jebus-ah a teng mite in David kiangah, “Hih lai-ah nang nong pai kei ding hi,” na ci uh hi. Ahi zongin David in David khuapi a kici Zion munmuan'huai a la hi
David in, “Jebus mite a va sim masa peuhpeuh pen ukpi leh ukpa hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Zeruiah' tapa Joab kuanto masa ahih ciangin amah, ukpi a suak hi
Tua ciangin munmuan'huaina sungah David teng hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua khua pen David khuapi kici hi
Tua ciangin amah in Millo panin a kualin khuapi lam hi. Joab in khuapi sung a omlai mun teng puahkik hi
Vanglian Topa in amah ompih ahih manin David a lian semsem hi.
Tu-in hihte pen Israel tawh kisai-in Topa' thugen bangin amah kumpi-in a bawl dingin Israel khempeuh tawh ama kumpi gam sungah amah nakpi takin a huh David' mi a thahat a ukpite ahi hi
David' mi a thahatte a kiciamtehna: Hakmoni mi Jashobeam pen mi thumte a ukpi ahi hi. Amah in a teipi tawh mihing za thum do a, hun khat sungin that khin hi
Tua ciangin a thahat mihing thumte lak panin amah a zompa pen Ahoh-te beh Dodo' tapa Eleazar ahi hi
Filistia mite galsim dingin a kikaihkhop laitakun Pasdammim-ah David tawh a om hi. Tua lai-ah mangbuhham a dimna leitang khat om a, Filistia mite' kiang panin mite tai hi
Ahih hangin amah in tua leitang laizangah pan'mun la-in hu a, Filistia mite that hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in gualzawhna lianpi a pia hi
Refaim kuamah Filistia mite' galkapte in giahphual a sat laitakun Adullam leihawm David kiang suangpi-ah ukpi sawmthumte sung panin mihing thum paisuk uh hi
Tua hunin munmuan'huai sungah David om a, Filistia khuacingte Bethlehem-ah om uh hi
Tua ciangin David in, “Kulhkongpi gei-a Bethlehem tuikhuk panin mi khat in tuidawn ding kei hong pia leh!” ci-in lunggulhna tawh a pau hi

Tua ciangin a thahat mihing thumte in Filistia mite' giahphual phulin kongpi gei-a om Bethlehem tuikhuk panin tui tawi uh a, a tui la-in David kiangah paipih uh hi. Ahih hangin David in tua tui dawnlo hi. Amah in Topa-a' dingin sung a

“Ka Pasian' mai-ah hih bangin ka gamta het kei ding hi. Hih mihingte' nuntakna sisan tui dawn ding ka hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a nuntakna uh khamin kei kiangah hong paipih uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a tui dawnlo hi. A thahat mi thumte in hih bangin na a sem uh ahi hi
Tu-in Joab' sanggampa Abishai pen sawmthumte lakah a ukpi ahi hi. Amah in a teipi tawh mihing za thum do-in amaute that a, mihing sawmthumte' banah min khat ngah thuah hi
Amah pen mihing sawmthumte sung panin a minthang pen hi a, amaute a ukpa a suak hi; ahih hangin amah in mihing thumte ban nailo hi

Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah pen Kabzeel khuami gal a hang, na lianpite a sempa ahi hi. Amah in Moab galhang mi nih vatlum hi. Amah zong paisukin vuk a kiat ni khatin leihawm sunga om humpinelkai khat that hi

Amah in Egypt mi khat, a thagol, pi sagih leh alang a sang mi khat a that hi. Egypt-pa in a khutsungah siamgante' siamlawngpi cia a pha teipi khat nei hi. Ahih hangin ciangkhut khat tawh ama kiangah Benaiah paisuk a, Egypt-pa' khutsung panin a teipi sutkhia-in ama teipi mah tawh amah a that hi
Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah in hih nate sem a, a thahat mi sawmthumte' banah min khat ngah thuah hi
Mihing sawmthumte lakah amah minthang a, ahih hangin amah in mi thumte ban nailo hi. Tua ciangin David in amah a cingte a ukin a koih hi
Galkap lak panin a thahat mite pen Joab' sanggampa Asahel, Bethlehem khuami Dodo' tapa Elhanan
Harod khuami Shammoth, Pelon khuami Helez
Tekoa khuami Ikkesh' tapa Ira, Anathoth khuami Abiezer
Hushah khuami Sibbekai, Ahoh-te beh Ilai
Netofah khuami Maharai, Netofah khuami Baanah' tapa Heled
Benjamin mite sung panin Gibeah khuami Ribai' tapa Ithai, Pirathon khuami Benaiah
Gaash mualkuam mi Hurai, Betharabah khuami Abiel
Bahurim khuami Azmaveth, Shaalbon khuami Eliahba
Gizon khuami Hashem, Harar khuami Shagee' tapa Jonathan
Harar khuami Sakhar' tapa Ahiam, Ur' tapa Elifal
Mekherath khuami Hefer, Pelon khuami Ahijah
Karmel khuami Hezro, Ezbai' tapa Naarai
Nathan' sanggampa Joel, Hagri' tapa Mibhar
Ammon mi Zelek, Zeruiah' tapa Joab' galhiam puapa Beeroth khuami Naharai
Ithri mi Ira leh Gareb
Hit mi Uriah, Ahlai' tapa Zabad
Reuben mite' makai khat ahi, Reuben mi Shiza' tapa Adina, leh amah tawh mihing sawmthum
Maakah' tapa Hanan, Mithni mi Joshafat
Ashterath khuami Uzzia, Aroer khuami Hotham' tapate Shama leh Jeiel
Tiz khuami Shimri' tapate Jediael leh Joha
Mahavah khuami Eliel, Elnaam' tapate Jeribai leh Joshaviah, Moab mi Ithmah
Zobah khuami Eliel, Obed, leh Jaasiel ahi uh hi.
